\tzpentry{ID3667}{Displacement Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3667 introduces Displacement Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \xi &\sim |Q - Q_c|^{-\nu}, \quad \nu = 0.630(2) \\ \mathcal{C} &\sim |Q - Q_c|^{-\gamma}, \quad \gamma = 1.237(2) \end{align}
